headline: Should Boeing's Safety and Quality Issues Scare Away Investors?
summary: Investors can't ignore Boeing's quality and safety track record. Some market observers say it merits scrutiny, while others believe the worst is behind the company.

raw.headline: Should Boeing's Safety and Quality Issues Scare Away Investors?
raw.summary: Investors can't ignore Boeing's quality and safety track record. Some market observers say it merits scrutiny, while others believe the worst is behind the company.

headline: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
summary: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.
